data.body:
[Cherry Blossom Festival Commotion! Celebration Gift]

Sensei, Schale prepared a gift for the rerun event!
Please check your mailbox for your gift of 10-Recruitment Ticketx1!
(Available until 9/27/2022 14:59 PM (UTC))
